semantic_text: Downloading Corel Draw x5 from here https://archive.org/details/corel-draw-x5-2010 onto the windows machine worked and we have downloaded all the maps and prescriptions to the same ondrive folders as above.
All maps have been georeferenced 🚀

Stream reach breaks have been moved to match those on the georeferenced maps, see info #92. The corrected reach breaks are stored in `Projects/gis/restoration_wedzin_kwa/ncfdc_1998_reach_breaks.geojson`. The original reach breaks are stored in `Projects/gis/restoration_wedzin_kwa/ncfdc_1998_reach_breaks_raw.geojson`

Added utm coordinates for almost all the traditional fishing sites documented in `data/trad_fish_sites_gottesfeld_rabnett2007FishPassage.csv`. There we a couple I didn't know where they were.

Converted them to an sf object and added to the QGIS project, stored here `Projects/gis/restoration_wedzin_kwa/trad_fish_sites_gottesfeld_rabnett2007FishPassage.gpkg`.

v49 - push from Al 
- Add Aitken falls trail kmz. 
- Begin reach break corrections as per #91 
- add 3d model of robert hatch

We are now georeferencing these maps in the QGIS projects, with some tips documented here https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/fish_passage_guidebook/issues/26

add mention of 2024 stream walk on upper waterfall creek, point to bulk 2022 report. Update site map. mention waterfall in site location. As per https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/fish_passage_skeena_2021_reporting/issues/14#issuecomment-2759001511
bump to v.0.1.1 - added fern data
make headers unnumbered

update `fpr_plot_fish_box()` to theme_bw to close [#35](https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/fpr/issues/35)
